top_signals.title: Treasury yields rise, as oil resumes climb on mounting U.S.-Iran tensions - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Treasury yields rise, as oil resumes climb on mounting U.S.-Iran tensions  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ladbrokes Owner Entain to Cut 2% of Staff as UK Taxes Hit
top_signals.summary: Entain Plc will cut 500 jobs, or about 2% of its global workforce, as the gambling industry grapples with higher UK taxes, tighter regulation and growing competition from prediction markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Balbec Secures $930 Million in Commitments for Asset-Based Credit Fund
top_signals.summary: Alternative asset manager Balbec Capital LP has obtained commitments of more than $930 million for its latest flagship fund that will invest in a variety of asset-based credit, according to a filing on Thursday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: India’s Maruti to Fight Order to Replace Car Over Ethanol Damage
top_signals.summary: Maruti Suzuki India Ltd. said it will challenge a consumer court order asking the nation’s largest carmaker to replace a vehicle over alleged damage from ethanol-blended fuel, a case that assumes significance as the debate over the nation’s biofuel push intensifies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
